moments.title: Wimbledon Quarter-Finals Day
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are in full swing, with today marking the thrilling Quarter-Finals as players battle for a spot in the semis.

angles.name: Big Match Build-up
angles.copy: Who are you backing in today's Wimbledon Quarter-Finals? The tension is building on Centre Court!

angles.name: Underdog Story
angles.copy: Every year there's a surprise package at Wimbledon. Who's been your unexpected favourite to watch this tournament?

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, known for hits like 'Yellow Submarine' and 'With a Little Help from My Friends'.

angles.name: Drummer Icon
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Ringo Starr is celebrating his 86th birthday today with his annual 'Peace & Love' celebration. Send him your good vibes!

moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is nearing its dramatic conclusion, with England celebrating a recent win over Mexico and the tournament anthem 'Dai Dai' by Shakira and Burna Boy trending.

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup final is almost here! What's been your favourite moment of the tournament so far?

angles.name: Trending Anthem
angles.copy: Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' is climbing the charts as the World Cup anthem! Is it on your playlist?

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Latest
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the UK #1 for a second consecutive week, while Sienna Spiro's 'Material Lover' tops the Official Trending Chart.

angles.name: #1 Track
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still at #1 with 'Rein Me In'! Are you still loving the track?

angles.name: On The Rise
angles.copy: Sienna Spiro is topping the trending chart with 'Material Lover' from The Devil Wears Prada 2! Hear the future hits now.

moments.title: Trying S5 Premieres
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the acclaimed British comedy series 'Trying', starring Esther Smith and Rafe Spall, premieres on Apple TV+ tomorrow, July 8th.

angles.name: New Season Drop
angles.copy: Get ready for more laughs and heartfelt moments! 'Trying' Season 5 drops tomorrow on Apple TV+. Who's watching?

angles.name: Stream It
angles.copy: Your next binge-watch is here! The new season of 'Trying' arrives tomorrow. Perfect for a mid-week pick-me-up.

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes over Moseley Park in Birmingham this weekend, from July 10th to 12th, featuring innovative UK and international acts.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Birmingham! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off this Friday. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Ready for a weekend of incredible music? Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul is bringing the vibes to Moseley Park!

moments.title: Ann Droid on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the quirky new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', about a grieving widow and her eldercare robot, premiering July 11th.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan in a new BBC comedy? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' looks hilarious, starting this Saturday.

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Need a new laugh? 'Ann Droid' with Diane Morgan hits the BBC this weekend. Get ready for some offbeat humour!

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival London
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace's Kaleidoscope Festival is back this Saturday, July 11th, for a day of music, comedy, and arts in London.

angles.name: Ally Pally Fun
angles.copy: London! Kaleidoscope Festival is on this Saturday at Alexandra Palace. Who's heading for the panoramic views and great music?

angles.name: City Festival
angles.copy: Your weekend plans sorted: Kaleidoscope Festival brings the best of music and entertainment to Ally Pally this Saturday!

moments.title: The Dark on ITV/ITVX
moments.blurb: A moody thriller set in the Scottish wilderness, 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres July 12th on ITV and ITVX.

angles.name: New Thriller
angles.copy: Prepare for a gripping new series! 'The Dark', set in the stunning Scottish wilderness, starts this Sunday on ITV.

angles.name: Scottish Drama
angles.copy: If you love a good mystery, 'The Dark' looks like essential viewing. A serial killer in the Scottish Highlands? We're hooked!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival returns to Stornoway in the Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15th to 18th, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music.

angles.name: Celtic Celebration
angles.copy: Scotland! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off next week. Get ready for four days of incredible music and culture!

angles.name: Island Festival
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides next week for the Hebridean Celtic Festival? Share your favourite acts!

moments.title: Luke Hemmings turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist and guitarist of 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer this Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS track?

angles.name: 30 & Thriving
angles.copy: Luke Hemmings hits the big 3-0 this week! Celebrate with us by blasting your favourite 5 Seconds of Summer hits.

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's original major, begins its practice days on July 12th at Royal Birkdale, with tournament play starting July 16th.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The Open Championship is just around the corner! Practice days start this Sunday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Golf fans, get excited! The Open Championship is back at Royal Birkdale next week. The countdown to tee-off is on!

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: Summer holidays are officially underway for many schools across the UK, with others breaking up in the coming weeks.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Summer holidays are HERE for many! What are your plans for soaking up the sun and making memories?

angles.name: Staycation or Getaway
angles.copy: Are you heading for a UK staycation or an adventure abroad this summer? Tell us your holiday plans!
